title: Traveling with Kyle - Living in Chile part 10/17

transcript.text: Like I was like rolling my eyes like what the fuck man I mean don't don't they don't they enjoy
Having a nice house like don't they want to help me but he didn't even have a job anyways
Because he'd been fired from his brother for stealing um gold his brother owns a jewelry
Fabrication place and her other brother didn't have a job so nobody had a job and my wife wasn't
Even helping me and she didn't have a job I don't even know what she was doing she was cooking for
Me but anyways I was kind of I got really drunk off this pisco stuff am I going away party and
It kind of I guess all those four months of frustrations just boiled up in me
And I got like really I just snapped I lost my shit and next thing I got really drunk though I was like
Totally hammered anyways next thing I know I'm like standing above my wife's mom like
Screaming at her like how the fuck could you have kicked your own husband out of your house
Um and you and and then I go in her bedroom and I pull I pull an art thing of Pablo Neruda off the
Wall because I thought it was her father my wife's father I go how could you kick him out of the house
And you're like oh that's not him that's Pablo Neruda I was like really so it looked just like
Pablo Neruda but it was made by my wife's dad who was like a really talented artist like it looked
It was great then he did one of her and this is what she says she says that he made it but it looks
Exactly like her it's like this guy is like the most talented artist I've ever seen and as far as
Woodwork carving it was amazing and also a great singer I mean this guy he was crazy but he was
Great artist anyways um so then like her brother's like okay well you and me let's go drink some beers
Back in your house and so we go back there and but before that I was like it was like yo how would
You kick your dad how would you kick your man out of the house and you you're a fucking crackhead loser
What the fuck you don't even help me and then I go you know what I'm gonna help you if you don't
Even have a job I'm gonna help you open up your own business I have a cool idea for you you can knock
On people's doors and try and sell them numbers for their houses because normally none of the houses
Had numbers on them and it couldn't make stuff make it hard for people to find the houses you know like
When people call the cops it takes like an hour for the cops to get there because they can't find
Where the house is like that actually happened with me once took them like an hour because they
Couldn't find the house so um but he's like no I don't need your help so then I take him back to
Our house and we're drinking a beer and I go again and I go yeah man no seriously if you don't have a
Job I'm gonna help you get your own job get your own opening up your own business putting numbers on
Houses and he goes he goes no no man I don't need your help and I go but you're a fucking crackhead dude
You need my help and then so he starts like screaming at me so that like I went nuts at that point
And so I punched him in the face I'm not I must have been like thinking that I wanted to do that
Beforehand because I just did it instinctually and then I lunged at him and I tried to squeeze his
Esophagus shut but he had his head down so all I was doing really was just scratching him and
Um and then like I guess my wife like his wife somehow like separate me from and then next thing
I know like his mother her mother's there and so there's all three of them are pinning me up against
The wall and then she's like she's like you know don't act like this in my house or something like
This and I was like what your house this is my house not your house so then I grab her um my mother-in-law
Throw her up against the refrigerator I'm like you know it's my house and then I think she's like
Attacks me and like starts pulling it like pulls a clump of hair out of my head she's like you're
Kicked out you're kicked out so I was like okay so I'm like real coming around like looking for my
Passport and then by by now her brother he had come to and he's like so then they're like
Screw they're both screaming at me together
Like on the like at the top of their lungs so I close the door but then she they kick the door
And they're all screaming at me so I like close the door and then I end up you know we end up going
To sleep and then the next day I hear her mom out there like he's kicked out he you know get him
Kicked out right now I'm gonna have you know your brother come over and kick him out and she told me
My wife told me not to go out and argue so I was just kind of inside watching and then we went out
But that was like three days before I was going to fly to America so we so we like I guess spent a
Couple of days like riding bikes around town looking for an apartment to rent because supposedly I was
Kicked out um and then I flew to America and I was in America for two and a half months I've been there I
Hadn't been there for four years two and a half months and got a job as a night writers like driving
Drunk people home in their own cars for two and a half months um saving money it was cool to have a
Break and then I came home oh yeah but while I was in America I was talking to her and she was saying
That her family was like really poor and had like was having money problems like it didn't I couldn't
Didn't have enough money to like eat because like you know he'd like I guess hadn't gotten a job yet
And the father wasn't living there so there was nobody providing any money because the father was
A mechanic and if she could like she was starving to death so could I send her my credit card so I
Sent her my credit card but I was stupid and I didn't put a limit on it like a hundred two hundred
Dollar limit just to get enough money so she ends up spending like six hundred dollars of my money
And I get how I get back there and she she needed the money I guess because her mom wanted to open up
A business selling hamburgers so she went and bought the fixings for hamburgers but like a hundred dollars
Worth of hamburger fixings but instead of selling even a single hamburger she uh they just ate all of the
Fixings and uh and then my wife racked up like a hundred dollar or hundred two hundred dollar bills at
Two different department stores buying stuff for her kid and she bought a car my idea what I thought
What should we agreed on was that uh we were going to uh use the money the extra like when as soon as I
Had the money we were going to pay somebody to fix the mini I wanted a mini to work but uh she had
Given up on this other mini mechanic because he wasn't uh he wasn't gonna put the engine together he
Said it was gonna cost like a lot more like five hundred dollars just to put them in together when he
Originally said it wouldn't cost that much so she just gave up on him and gave up on the car
Completely so she she bought another car a Renault for like I don't know how much so I come back and
She picks me up in the airport in this Renault and then she's like oh yeah this is our car by the way
I'm like what what about the mini but anyways we had a car that was working so I thought that that was
Actually kind of cool so um but I guess I heard later that all of her friends were telling her that
All of her family was telling her I was convinced that I wasn't going to come home that I was going
To stay in America and like come to think of it that actually would have been a really sensical
Thing for me to do probably any normal person would have done that but I was kind of um I don't know
I came back for another go because I wanted to teach English for myself and I hadn't really been
Totally successful doing that well plus you know I was married so uh I come back and um
I made a website for teaching English and I put an ad in the newspaper and so people would call me
And uh um and uh yeah I managed hooking myself up with work and I had plenty of work it was awesome
Finally three years after getting there I was uh I'm working for myself and not having to worry
About working for somebody else it's really hard to teach for yourself therapy and actually have lots
Of work because it's so competitive and the government most people when they take classes it's
Just got companies and the government pays for pretty much for most of the money that the class costs
So you can really only teach English if you if you teach privately with individual people and not
A whole lot of people do that and so I was mainly doing that just running out to people's houses I did
Have a couple of companies that would pay me I don't know why they didn't use sensei the government
Maybe they didn't know about or didn't qualify or something but uh um so I did that for two more
Years I was in Chile Santiago doing that and that's when I really started I think doing more mountain
Bike trips with my buddy Tony on the weekends um we did one where uh we had a lot of cool mountain
Bike trips um oh I think I'm out of time I think I'll talk about that later though I'm sweating my ass
Clothes off in here hmm mmm
